name: Sausage Plait (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F or gas mark 6.
2. Chop the tomatoes, onion, and mushrooms and mix with the sausage meat and herbs.
3. Roll out the pastry on a floured surface to a rectangle measuring 12 inches by 9 inches and place it on a greased baking tray.
4. Arrange the filling down the center of the pastry.
5. Cut the pastry into half-inch strips at an angle, on either side of the filling.
6. Fold the pastry strips alternately over the mixture to resemble a plait.
7. Brush with beaten egg and bake for 30-35 minutes. Serves 4.
